title: Brewin' And Chewin'
body:
![Brewin' And Chewin' Logo](https://i.imgur.com/EFkjwBq.png)

### 📖 Overview

**Brewin' and Chewin'** is an addon mod for Farmer's Delight.

Using a keg, you can brew or ferment many new foods, including liquors, cheese, and fudge!

Please Report any issues you find either to our [GitHub](https://github.com/MerchantPug/BrewinAndChewin/issues/) or [Discord](https://discord.gg/7PBaMYNtrg)!! It helps us a lot!

### Getting Started
Brewin' and Chewin' does not contain a guidebook, instead you should follow the advancements.

These explain some of the things you are able to do within the mod. You can press the advancement screen key (bound to **L** by default), and then navigate to the Brewin' and Chewin' tab (Beer icon), to figure out what you can do.

If you would like a more direct guide, I would read the [Getting Started](https://github.com/MerchantPug/BrewinAndChewin/wiki/Getting-Started) page on the Wiki

### 🔨 Required Dependencies
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

### 🎮 Discord
- [Chef's Delights Discord](https://discord.gg/7PBaMYNtrg) for questions or whatever~
